name: early_wake
instructions: Wake up close to sunrise. Early waking synchronizes circadian rhythm with natural light cycles and reduces morning Kapha heaviness.
contraindications: avoid if recovering from sleep deprivation or illness

name: morning_sunlight
instructions: Spend time outdoors in morning sunlight. Natural light resets circadian rhythm signals and supports hormone balance.
contraindications: avoid prolonged exposure in intense sun

name: tongue_scraping
instructions: Use a tongue scraper after waking to remove metabolic waste from the tongue and stimulate digestive reflexes.
contraindications: avoid if tongue has wounds or infection

name: warm_water_morning
instructions: Drink a glass of warm water after waking to stimulate digestion and rehydrate the body after sleep.

name: oil_pulling
instructions: Swish sesame or coconut oil in the mouth for several minutes to improve oral hygiene and reduce dryness.

name: nasya
instructions: Apply a few drops of medicated oil into the nostrils to lubricate nasal passages and calm Vata in the head region.

name: abhyanga
instructions: Massage warm oil over the body before bathing. Oil nourishes tissues, improves circulation, and stabilizes the nervous system.

name: gentle_morning_stretch
instructions: Perform gentle stretching movements after waking to activate muscles and improve circulation.

name: grounding_yoga
instructions: Practice slow grounding yoga postures to calm the nervous system and stabilize Vata.

name: brisk_walk
instructions: Walk briskly to stimulate metabolism and reduce Kapha stagnation.

name: dry_brushing
instructions: Brush the skin before bathing to stimulate lymphatic circulation and reduce Kapha accumulation.

name: warming_spices
instructions: Add digestive spices such as ginger, cumin, and black pepper to meals to stimulate metabolism.

name: ginger_before_meal
instructions: Consume a slice of fresh ginger before meals to activate digestive enzymes and improve appetite.

name: midday_main_meal
instructions: Eat the largest meal around midday when digestive fire is strongest.

name: digestive_walk
instructions: Take a slow walk after meals to stimulate digestion and prevent heaviness.
contraindications: avoid immediately after very heavy meals

name: mindful_chewing
instructions: Chew food thoroughly before swallowing to support proper digestion.

name: meal_spacing
instructions: Maintain adequate spacing between meals to allow digestion to complete.

name: afternoon_hydration
instructions: Drink water or herbal infusions during the afternoon to maintain hydration.

name: nature_exposure
instructions: Spend time in nature to calm the nervous system and improve mental clarity.

name: meditation
instructions: Practice meditation to calm mental activity and restore emotional balance.

name: breathing_practice
instructions: Practice slow breathing exercises to regulate the nervous system and reduce stress.

name: padabhyanga
instructions: Massage warm oil into the soles of the feet before sleep to calm the nervous system.

name: digital_detox
instructions: Avoid screens before bedtime to allow natural melatonin release and improve sleep quality.

name: sleep_ritual
instructions: Follow a consistent relaxing routine before sleep to signal the body to prepare for rest.

name: gratitude_journaling
instructions: Write down positive experiences from the day to cultivate a balanced emotional state.

name: warm_breakfast
instructions: Eat a warm, freshly prepared breakfast such as porridge or cooked grains. Warm foods support digestion and stabilize Vata in the morning.

name: light_breakfast
instructions: Choose a light breakfast like fruit or herbal tea when appetite is low. This prevents Kapha heaviness and sluggish digestion.
contraindications: avoid when very hungry or weak

name: midday_sunlight_break
instructions: Step outside for natural light exposure around midday to reinforce circadian rhythm signals.

name: standing_work_break
instructions: Stand or move briefly after prolonged sitting to stimulate circulation and reduce Kapha stagnation.

name: hydration_reminder
instructions: Drink water periodically throughout the day to maintain hydration and support metabolic processes.

name: herbal_digestive_tea
instructions: Drink a mild digestive tea with ginger, cumin, or fennel after meals to support digestion.

name: cooling_pranayama
instructions: Practice cooling breathing such as sheetali pranayama to reduce internal heat and calm Pitta.

name: shade_walk
instructions: Walk in a shaded or cool environment to calm body heat and improve circulation.

name: evening_stretch
instructions: Perform gentle stretches to release tension accumulated during the day.

name: warm_bath
instructions: Take a warm bath to relax muscles and calm the nervous system.

name: cooling_bath
instructions: Use lukewarm water for bathing during hot conditions to reduce body heat.

name: calming_music
instructions: Listen to calming instrumental music to relax the nervous system.

name: mindful_walking
instructions: Walk slowly while observing breathing and surroundings to calm mental activity.

name: reading_evening
instructions: Read calming material before sleep to transition the mind into rest mode.

name: consistent_bedtime
instructions: Maintain a consistent sleep time daily to stabilize circadian rhythm.

name: evening_meditation
instructions: Meditate briefly in the evening to reduce accumulated stress.

name: light_dinner
instructions: Eat a light dinner to prevent nighttime digestive overload and support sleep.

name: avoid_late_snacking
instructions: Avoid eating late snacks to allow digestion to complete before sleep.

name: evening_wind_down
instructions: Reduce stimulation and activity gradually in the evening to prepare the body for sleep.

name: screen_break_day
instructions: Take short breaks from screens throughout the day to reduce mental fatigue.

name: gratitude_reflection
instructions: Reflect on positive experiences from the day to cultivate emotional stability.

name: sunset_observation
instructions: Observe the sunset quietly to help the body transition from activity to rest.

name: silence_period
instructions: Spend time in silence without stimulation to calm the mind.

name: mindful_tea_break
instructions: Pause for a warm herbal tea break to reset mental focus.

name: posture_reset
instructions: Correct posture and stretch the spine periodically during the day to prevent stiffness.

name: cooked_vegetable_meal
instructions: Prefer cooked vegetables rather than raw foods when digestion feels weak. Cooking softens fiber and makes nutrients easier to absorb.

name: warm_soup_meal
instructions: Eat warm soups or broths during dinner to support digestion while keeping the meal light.

name: avoid_cold_foods
instructions: Avoid very cold foods and drinks during meals because they weaken digestive fire.

name: digestive_spice_mix
instructions: Use digestive spices such as cumin, coriander, fennel, and ginger while cooking meals.

name: midday_rest_pause
instructions: Take a brief pause during midday to relax and reset mental focus.

name: deep_breath_reset
instructions: Pause for slow deep breathing to calm the nervous system and reduce stress.

name: sunrise_observation
instructions: Observe the sunrise calmly to strengthen circadian rhythm and promote alertness.

name: morning_journaling
instructions: Write brief thoughts or intentions for the day to organize mental focus.

name: gratitude_meditation
instructions: Reflect on gratitude during meditation to cultivate positive mental states.

name: vigorous_exercise
instructions: Perform vigorous exercise such as jogging or cycling to stimulate metabolism and reduce Kapha stagnation.

name: dynamic_yoga
instructions: Practice dynamic yoga sequences that stimulate circulation and increase energy.

name: intermittent_fasting_window
instructions: Maintain a natural fasting gap between dinner and breakfast to support metabolic balance.
contraindications: pregnancy or medical conditions requiring regular meals

name: reduce_sugar_intake
instructions: Reduce sugary foods and beverages to prevent Kapha accumulation and metabolic sluggishness.

name: stimulating_pranayama
instructions: Practice energizing breathing techniques such as kapalabhati to stimulate metabolism.

name: morning_music_activation
instructions: Listen to uplifting music in the morning to increase alertness and motivation.

name: outdoor_activity
instructions: Spend time outdoors performing physical activity such as walking or light sports.

name: gentle_evening_walk
instructions: Walk gently in the evening to support digestion and relax the body.

name: calming_breathing_evening
instructions: Practice slow breathing to calm the nervous system before sleep.

name: warm_herbal_milk
instructions: Drink warm herbal milk with calming spices before sleep to promote relaxation.

name: digital_sunset
instructions: Stop using screens after sunset to protect natural sleep hormone rhythms.

name: bedroom_darkening
instructions: Keep the bedroom dark to promote deeper sleep and proper melatonin release.

name: bedroom_cooling
instructions: Maintain a slightly cool bedroom temperature to improve sleep quality.

name: reflective_writing
instructions: Write reflections about the day to process thoughts and release mental tension.

name: compassion_practice
instructions: Practice compassion or kindness meditation to cultivate emotional balance.

name: creative_expression
instructions: Engage in creative activities like drawing, music, or writing to release emotional tension.

name: regular_meal_timing
instructions: Eat meals at consistent times each day. Regular meal timing stabilizes digestive rhythms and prevents irregular hunger patterns.

name: avoid_overeating
instructions: Eat until comfortably satisfied rather than overly full. Overeating weakens digestion and increases metabolic waste.

name: warm_lunch_preference
instructions: Choose freshly cooked warm meals at lunch to support strong midday digestion.

name: bitter_greens_intake
instructions: Include bitter greens such as spinach or fenugreek leaves to reduce excess heat and support liver metabolism.

name: cooling_food_choice
instructions: Favor cooling foods such as cucumber, coconut, or leafy greens during hot conditions.
contraindications: avoid excessive cold foods in weak digestion

name: reduce_spicy_foods
instructions: Limit very spicy foods if experiencing heat, acidity, or irritability.

name: herbal_coriander_water
instructions: Drink coriander-infused water to gently cool digestion and reduce internal heat.

name: moonlight_walk
instructions: Take a calm walk under moonlight or cool evening air to reduce accumulated heat and tension.

name: evening_relaxation_yoga
instructions: Practice slow restorative yoga postures in the evening to relax muscles and calm the nervous system.

name: grounding_breathing
instructions: Use slow diaphragmatic breathing to stabilize nervous system activity and reduce Vata agitation.

name: warm_oil_head_massage
instructions: Massage warm oil gently into the scalp to calm nerves and reduce tension before sleep.

name: warm_foot_bath
instructions: Soak the feet in warm water to relax the body and improve sleep readiness.

name: reduce_evening_caffeine
instructions: Avoid caffeine late in the day to prevent stimulation of the nervous system before sleep.

name: evening_screen_filter
instructions: Use screen filters or reduce brightness in the evening to reduce blue-light disruption.

name: morning_hydration
instructions: Drink water shortly after waking to restore hydration and activate metabolism.

name: breathing_pause_break
instructions: Take short breathing pauses during stressful work periods to reset mental focus.

name: desk_stretch_routine
instructions: Stretch the neck, shoulders, and spine during desk work to prevent stiffness and improve circulation.

name: midday_mindfulness
instructions: Pause midday for brief mindfulness practice to reduce mental overload.

name: evening_reflection
instructions: Reflect on the day’s experiences to improve self-awareness and emotional balance.

name: daily_kindness_action
instructions: Perform small acts of kindness or generosity to cultivate positive emotional states.

name: reduce_multitasking
instructions: Focus on one task at a time to improve attention and reduce cognitive fatigue.

name: mindful_eating_pause
instructions: Pause briefly before eating to relax and prepare digestion.

name: daily_routine_consistency
instructions: Maintain consistent wake, meal, and sleep times to stabilize biological rhythms.

name: morning_intention_setting
instructions: Set a clear intention for the day to improve mental focus and emotional stability.

name: evening_gratitude_reflection
instructions: Reflect on positive events before sleep to cultivate a calm and satisfied mental state.

name: spring_light_diet
instructions: During spring favor lighter foods such as vegetables, legumes, and spices to counter Kapha accumulation that occurs naturally in this season.

name: summer_cooling_foods
instructions: Eat cooling foods like cucumber, coconut, and fresh fruits during summer to balance rising heat in the body.
contraindications: avoid excessive cold foods if digestion is weak

name: autumn_vata_protection
instructions: During windy autumn months emphasize warm meals, oil massage, and grounding routines to stabilize Vata.

name: winter_nourishing_diet
instructions: Eat nourishing foods such as soups, grains, and healthy fats during winter to support stronger digestive fire and maintain vitality.

name: seasonal_spice_adjustment
instructions: Adjust spice use according to climate: warming spices in cold weather and milder spices during hot seasons.

name: sunrise_movement
instructions: Engage in light movement soon after sunrise to activate metabolism and reinforce circadian rhythms.

name: grounding_walk
instructions: Take a slow evening walk focusing on steady breathing and relaxed posture to stabilize nervous system activity.

name: morning_breathing_sequence
instructions: Perform a brief breathing sequence after waking to improve oxygenation and alertness.

name: calm_music_evening
instructions: Listen to calm instrumental music to ease mental tension before sleep.

name: gratitude_evening_reflection
instructions: Reflect on positive experiences of the day to cultivate emotional stability and reduce stress.

name: mindful_conversation
instructions: Engage in calm and mindful communication to maintain emotional balance and reduce mental agitation.

name: nature_sitting
instructions: Sit quietly in a natural environment to calm sensory stimulation and restore mental clarity.

name: deep_relaxation_pose
instructions: Practice deep relaxation posture such as savasana to release physical and mental tension.

name: herbal_sleep_tea
instructions: Drink mild herbal teas such as chamomile or tulsi before sleep to promote relaxation.

name: bedtime_reading
instructions: Read calm non-stimulating material to transition the mind into rest mode.

name: sleep_environment_quiet
instructions: Maintain a quiet sleeping environment to support uninterrupted sleep cycles.

name: sleep_environment_dark
instructions: Reduce light exposure in the bedroom to enhance natural melatonin production.

name: daily_stretch_breaks
instructions: Take short stretch breaks throughout the day to improve circulation and prevent stiffness.

name: mindful_posture
instructions: Maintain upright posture during sitting to support breathing and spinal alignment.

name: evening_screen_shutdown
instructions: Turn off electronic screens one hour before bedtime to protect natural sleep cycles.

name: daily_reflection_pause
instructions: Pause briefly at the end of the day to reflect on actions and experiences, promoting self-awareness.

name: simple_breath_counting
instructions: Count slow breaths to focus attention and calm mental activity.

name: light_evening_conversation
instructions: Engage in relaxed and positive conversations during evening hours to maintain emotional calm before sleep.

name: daily_kindness_reflection
instructions: Reflect on acts of kindness given or received during the day to cultivate positive emotional states.

name: morning_body_awareness
instructions: Briefly scan the body after waking to become aware of physical sensations and set a calm tone for the day.
